mapper.select: select cl.id, cl.label_name, cl.label_code, cl.merchant_id, cl.create_time, cl.update_time, cl.state, cmi.merchant_name from cm_product_label cpl left join cm_label cl on cpl.label_id = cl.id left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cl.merchant_id = cmi.id where cl.state = '1' and cl.deleted = '0' and cpl.product_id = #{productId}
